Selection keys resolve through yaml:",inline" struct fields the same way
the config library flattens them.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config v0.0.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config => CONFIGDIR
-- main.go --
package main

func main() {
	if err := run(); err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}
}
-- store/store.go --
package store

//fabrik:config store
type Config struct {
	Group Group `yaml:",inline"`
}

type Group struct {
	Kind string `yaml:"kind" default:"memory"`
}

//fabrik:provider:select store.kind
type Store interface {
	Get(key string) string
}

type Memory struct{}

func (*Memory) Get(key string) string { return key }

//fabrik:provider case=memory
func NewMemory() *Memory { return &Memory{} }
-- web/web.go --
package web

import (
	"net/http"

	"app/store"
)

type Handlers struct {
	Store store.Store
}

//fabrik:http GET /
func (h *Handlers) Index(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.

package main

import (
	"app/store"
	"app/web"
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
	"os"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config"
	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/router"
)

func run() error {
	// Config
	storeConfig, err := config.Load[store.Config](config.FileOptional("config.yaml"), config.FileOptional("config.local.yaml"), config.KnownSections("store"), config.Section("store"))
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}

	// Providers
	r := router.New()
	storeStoreKind := storeConfig.Group.Kind
	var storeStore store.Store
	switch storeStoreKind {
	case "memory":
		storeStore = store.NewMemory()
	default:
		return fmt.Errorf("no store.Store implementation for %q", storeStoreKind)
	}
	webHandlers := &web.Handlers{
		Store: storeStore,
	}

	// Routes
	r.Method("GET", "/", webHandlers.Index)

	// Serve
	addr := ":8080"
	if p := os.Getenv("PORT"); p != "" {
		addr = ":" + p
	}
	return http.ListenAndServe(addr, r)
}
